text:
Hassam (ハサム, Hasamu) was a butler of the Zoldyck Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 322 

Background

He was once a butler of the Zoldyck Family and the lover of Mitsuba. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Hassam has never appeared in the story but is mentioned in a flashback detailing the discovery of the power within Alluka. When Mitsuba fails to fulfill Alluka's requests four times in a row as per the order of the child's mother forbidding the butler from heeding them, Mitsuba, along with Hassam, are both crushed to death as a consequence. 

Abilities & Powers

As a butler of the Zoldyck Family, Hassam was in constant training. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 40 He was also able to open the Testing Gates, since according to Zebro, opening the gates is the bare minimum, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 although the number of doors he could open is unknown.

Nen

Hassam likely knew how to use Nen because he was a butler for the Zoldyck Family.

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, his name is "Hasamu" (identical to the rōmaji version of the character's name).
